properties.summary: We have been favoured with instructions to offer for sale this Four Bedroom Semi Detached property boasting a wealth of features over two levels. Within access to Town Centre with C2C and District Line Station, local shops, schools and bus routes to neighbouring areas.

We have been favoured with instructions to offer for sale this spacious Four Bedroom Semi Detached Family Home boasting a wealth of features over two levels. Being within access to Upminster Town Centre and C2C and District Line Station, local shops and amenities plus schools for all ages.

Occupying an impressive plot and being located in one of Upminster’s most sought after residential turnings, we have been favoured with instructions to offer for sale this Three Bedroom Halls Adjoining Semi Detached Family Home.

UNDER OFFER!! No onward chain! A spacious four bed semi-detached family home in Upminster, close to amenities, sought after top schools, and transport. Features include open-plan living, four great-sized bedrooms, low-maintenance garden, and a detached garage.

This impressive detached chalet offers a remarkable blend of space and versatility, making it an ideal family home. Spanning an expansive 2,443 square feet, the property boasts four well-proportioned bedrooms, providing ample room for relaxation and privacy. The heart of the home is a g...

Deceptively spacious and unique to the market, this four-bedroom detached period property, we believe built circa late 1800’s, provides a rare opportunity to purchase such a distinctive period home which is full of character and charm! This superb home truly needs to be seen to be fully appreciated
